titleStmt.title: SII 10.135: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 135. (A.R. No. 347 of 1915.) ON THE GARUḌA PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF VALLABHARĀYA, PAMIDIPĀDU-AGRAHARAM, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1077.

summary.p: Refers to a gift of land by Gaṇḍirāju, son of Appana, the astrologer, to the temple of Chennakēśava of Pahiṁḍipāḍu for the merit of Rājēndra-Chōḍa and states that the suṅka and the marriage tax in Pahiṁḍipāḍu were also assigned to the said temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadviriṁccērmmanasō munī
ṁdrō vasiṣṭhanāmā numahān tapisvī ta
dasvayē kuṁḍḍinanāmadhēyō babhū
va vēdasya nivāsabhūmiḥ . gaṁgaugha
pratimē niraṁtarata tasyā svayē nirmmalē dharmmā
dyēṣu gatēṣu vēdavihitācārē ṣvanēkē ṣva
bhūt mukhyaḥ krovveli saṁjñitē puravarē
śrīnannapāryya stataḥ śrīmā nappananā
madhēya sukritī jannāṁbikāyā mabhūt
jyōtiśśāstrakalāvisiṣṭhasarita syā syārtthiciṁ
ttāmaṇē bhbhāryābhū de māṁbikā patihi
tēdānīṁttanāruṁddhatī tatputra ssacaritra
vrittamahita ssatpātravittārppaṇāsaktasaṁ
tatasatradō vijayatē śrī kaṁḍḍanāryyō bhuvi .
sōyaṁ svarnnapurāhvayē dvijavaragrāmē ramā
vallabhaṁ saṁsthāpya rttha mamalaṁ kṛ
tvā vimānaṁ tataḥ śilāraci
ta mācaṁdrārkka tatpūjādika
vṛttayē parikara kalayat . tadyathā
svasti śakavarṣamulu 1077 Agu nēṁṭi jyēṣṭhaśu
ddha 5 nāṁḍu jōsya koḍuku gaṁḍi
rāju pahiṁḍipāṭi śrīcennakēśavadēvaraṁ
bratiṣṭha sēsi dēvaraku trikālamunu
būjiṁci vipra hiṁḍipāṭi vṛttu
lalō nokavṛtti dīpamulu 3 ki no
ka vṛttiyu Īśānadikkuna Idduma
Āḍla paṭṭunnu dēvara nivedyamunakuṁ dagina parika
ramulakunu nutsavamunakugāṁ bahiṁḍipā
ṭi Uttarasīmamu ma 4 gā krammālapāṭi dakṣiṇa
muna drammālapāṭi polamulō badivuṭlu Āḍla
paṭṭu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigā niccitimi goṁkarāja
naku rājēṁdracōḍarājunaku dharmmuvugānu .
Ī dharmmuvunaku vighnamu sēsinavāru paṁccamahā
pātakamu sēsinavāru tama tallidaṁḍrula gaṁgga
kaṟutaṁ boḍcinavāru svaradattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁ varṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhi rvva
sudhā dattā bahubhi ścānupālitā yasya yasya
yadā bhūmi stasya dā phalaṁ . svastyantu
pahiṁḍipāṭi suṁkamū beṁḍli te
ṟayunu rājēṁdracōḍayarāju
la svadharmmuvugā niccitimi dīniki vi
ghnamu sēsinavāru ta koḍuku ka
pālamunaṁ guḍicinavāru guruvadha sē
sinavāru
Digital edition of SII 10.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
